sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80874" key="pento/rguios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντ-όργυιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80874.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of five fathoms,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.87</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>) ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πεντώρυγος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
